---
title: "Escapement-Goal-Figures"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Escapement-Goal-Figures}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(EGprocess)
library(tidyverse)
data("post_Igushik")
data("data_Igushik")
```

```{r}
p_Igushik <- make.age(data_Igushik, 3, 8)
brood_Igushik <- make.brood(data_Igushik, p_Igushik)
goal_Igushik <- 
  data.frame(
    yr = c(1984, 2001),
    lb = c(150000, 150000),
    ub = c(250000, 300000)
  )
plot_S(data_Igushik, 
       title = "Igushik River Sockeye Salmon", 
       goal_dat = goal_Igushik)
```
